after_hours_flow_summary: No emergency calls, except for existing builders and one property manager (GNM Pressure Washing)
office_hours_flow_summary: Clara will answer calls, and if necessary, transfer to Ben's second number
notes: The company has a service call fee of $115 and an hourly charge of $98. They have a property management company, GNM Pressure Washing, that they work with for emergency calls after hours.
